name: The festival of flowers
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis.

You find yourself in the city of Taldora during the beginning of spring when the Taldoria flowers bloom. To celebrate the locals host a large festival in their square where the flowers are freely given to outsiders.

Aldoria:

- The continent of Aldoria, a magical fantasy land, amongst numerous kingdoms has the empires of Numin and Ta'kr. The independent citystate of Taldora sits on the border between these two empires on a easily defensible mountain pass. Because of that Taldora has been run for generations by the Taldorian royal family which charges taxes on goods that pass through the city allowing the citystate to flourish and prosper. Because of that Taldora is open to all passing through its mountain pass between Numin and Ta'kr.

Taldoria flowers:

- Taldoria flowers are what the city of Taldora are named after, growing only in deep step crevices that litter the mountains around the city of Taldora. These flowers are a almost ethereal white with delicate petals and golden pollen, they smell very sweet almost candy-like. The real fascination about Taldoria flowers is the effect their pollen has on women, it transforms women into submissive but very needy sluts who can't seem to control their impulses. This effect on happens on woman with men being mainly unaffected by the flowers. Thankfully this effect wears off after about a day without exposure.

Taldoria concentrate:

- Taldoria concentrate is a substance made by concentrating Taldoria flower petal creating a golden liquid which has a similar but much much stronger effect than the pollen. However the major issue with Taldoria concentrate is because unlike the pollen Taldoria concentrate has a permanent effect on women when it is feed to them turning them into permanent sex slaves who are more than willing to allow themselves to be sold. A notable feature of woman who are either under the effects of the pollen or concentrate have hazy eyes.

Taldora's exports:

- The city of Taldora officially exports minerals mined from the nearby mountains as well as food to neighbouring towns. However Taldora is infamous amongst slave traders because of a the sale of female sex slaves by taking female travellers passing through the town, feeding them the Taldoria concentrate and than secretly selling them. The reason Taldora keeps its slave trade a secret isn't because its illegal in any way but because most of the slaves were attractive female travellers who passed through Taldora on the way to either Numin and Ta'kr and it being public knowledge of what Taldora is doing would cause a dramatic decrease of woman to brainwash into sex slaves.

Want me to make something specific? Make a suggestion on my form!
